@@ -0,0 +1,390 @@
+package main%0A%0Aimport %22fmt%22%0A%0A// x: n%C3%BAmero que est%C3%A1 sendo testado%0A// div: divisor que est%C3%A1 sendo testado%0Afunc eh_primo(x int, div int) bool %7B%0A%09if x %3C 2 %7B%0A%09%09return false%0A%09%7D%0A%09if div*div %3E x %7B%0A%09%09return true%0A%09%7D%0A%09if x%25div == 0 %7B%0A%09%09return false%0A%09%7D%0A%09return eh_primo(x, div+1)%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09var x int%0A%09fmt.Scan(&x)%0A%09if eh_primo(x, 2) %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22true%22)%0A%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22false%22)%0A%09%7D%0A%7D%0A
